name: basculegion-male
flavor_texts: Clads itself in the souls of comrades that perished before fulfilling their goals of journeying upstream. No other species throughout all Hisui's rivers is Basculegion's equal.
text: Basculegion-male is the Big Fish Pokémon. It is a water and ghost-type Pokémon. Abilities: swift-swim, adaptability, mold-breaker (hidden). Base stats — HP: 120, Attack: 112, Defense: 65, Sp. Atk: 80, Sp. Def: 75, Speed: 78. Evolution line: basculin → basculegion. Lore: Clads itself in the souls of comrades that perished before fulfilling their goals of journeying upstream. No other species throughout all Hisui's rivers is Basculegion's equal.
